name: libpackage-stash-xs-perl
title: libpackage-stash-xs-perl
summary: Perl module providing routines for manipulating stashes (XS version)
description:
Perl module providing routines for manipulating stashes (XS version)
Manipulating stashes (Perl's symbol tables) is occasionally necessary, but
incredibly messy, and easy to get wrong. Package::Stash hides all of that
behind a simple API.
.
Package::Stash::XS provides the faster and more correct XS implementation.
